articles.headline: Parliament Discusses Budget Allocation for Education Sector - 2017 Edition
articles.content: The Indian Parliament engaged in extensive discussions regarding the allocation of budget resources for the education sector during the current fiscal year. Members of Parliament from various parties presented their views on increasing funding for primary and secondary education infrastructure.
articles.author: Political Correspondent

articles.headline: Monsoon Patterns Show Significant Changes Across India - 2017 Edition
articles.content: Meteorological studies indicate notable changes in monsoon patterns across different regions of India. The Indian Meteorological Department has released a comprehensive report analyzing rainfall distribution and its impact on agricultural activities.

articles.author: Science Reporter

articles.headline: Parliament Discusses Budget Allocation for Education Sector - 2017 Edition
articles.content: The Indian Parliament engaged in extensive discussions regarding the allocation of budget resources for the education sector during the current fiscal year. Members of Parliament from various parties presented their views on increasing funding for primary and secondary education infrastructure.
